title: platystele microscopica
intro: Platystele microscopica, also known as the tiny orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Platystele microscopica include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and aiding in the healing of respiratory tract infections. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and crushing the roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
